a:r.a:t: The opportunity is to modernize and augment this operating model through an AI-led, agent-based framework that can proactively monitor websites, validate critical customer journeys, identify potential issues earlier, reduce manual triage effort, minimize downtime, and accelerate resolution timelines before business operations or customer experience are impacted.

PHTN.ai provides an opportunity to modernize this operating model through agentic automation — reducing manual effort, accelerating issue analysis, improving triage quality, and enabling faster, more proactive support outcomes.

The solution must be designed as a parallel, non-intrusive intelligence layer that enhances existing L1 and L1 Agent workflows without disrupting current support operations. It should safely integrate with website monitoring, Google Analytics, Azure App Insights, logs, knowledge bases, ticketing systems, and alerting tools while maintaining appropriate controls around query frequency, resource usage, and operational impact.

Photon will deliver this transition through a structured phased roadmap, covering current-state discovery, agent architecture design, prioritized use case selection, production deployment planning, effort estimation, commercial options, and value realization. The roadmap will establish a scalable foundation for expanding into additional AI-driven support, incident prevention, and customer experience optimization use cases.
Private And Confidential | Photon® Interactive UK Limited, Copyright ©2026
Darden’s digital support operations are well established, with strong processes already in place across monitoring, incident management, and production support.
